name: timestamp-forge-mcp
description: MCP server for timestamp conversion — Unix, ISO 8601, relative time

tools.name: current_time
tools.description: Get current time in multiple formats: Unix, UTC, ISO 8601, RFC 2822, SQL datetime.

tools.name: unix_to_human
tools.description: Convert Unix timestamp to human-readable formats. Auto-detects seconds vs milliseconds.

tools.name: date_diff
tools.description: Calculate the difference between two dates.
